html:
Exclusive to:

Merm Flort-ifications are a craftable Structure exclusive to Wurt in Don't Starve Together. They are found in the Structures Filter and Survivor Items Filter, require 5 Boards, 1 Tentacle Spots, and 2 Spears to craft, and an Science Machine to prototype. They can also only be placed on Marsh Turf.

Merm Flort-ifications spawn a single Loyal Merm Guard if a King of the Merms is present in the world. When killed, Loyal Merm Guards respawn in 4 minutes, or 6 days if the Loyal Merm Guard spawned in Winter. However, if the Merm Flort-ifications was built during Winter, Loyal Merm Guards will respawn in 4 minutes until the next Winter.

Skins

Main article: Belongings

Woven - Elegant
Mystic Collection
Mystic Merm Flort
Home of the King's Special Florpces.
Woven - Elegant
Swamp Collection
Mossy Merm Flort
For the glort-y of the King!

Trivia

  • Merm Flort-ifications were introduced to Don't Starve Together in the Wurt Character Update.
  • "Flort-ifications" appears to be a portmanteau of "Flort" and "Fortifications", 'Flort' evidently being related to Merms.
  • The amount of time it takes for a Loyal Merm Guard to respawn depends on what season was when the Loyal Merm Guard spawned, not the season it died. If a Loyal Merm Guard spawns during Autumn, it will take 4 minutes to respawn, even if it died in Winter. Likewise, a Loyal Merm Guard that spawns during Winter will take 6 days to respawn, even if it died in Spring.

"mermwatchtower"
“They seem happy to have found a king.”
–Wilson, when King of the Merms is alive.
“Ugh, the SMELL coming from that thing!”
–Willow, when King of the Merms is alive.
“Is tree full of fighting fish!”
–Wolfgang, when King of the Merms is alive.
“They seem to not wish us harm, for now.”
–Wendy, when King of the Merms is alive.
“THE PRESENCE OF A RULER HAS INCREASED THEIR EFFECTIVENESS”
–WX-78, when King of the Merms is alive.
“They seem to have found themselves a leader.”
–Wickerbottom, when King of the Merms is alive.
“They seem chipper, eh?”
–Woodie, when King of the Merms is alive.
“They're flying the royal banner.”
–Maxwell, when King of the Merms is alive.
“Tis a fine fortress for a fish beast.”
–Wigfrid, when King of the Merms is alive.
“Cool fort!”
–Webber, when King of the Merms is alive.
“At least they seem friendly!”
–Warly, when King of the Merms is alive.
“Glub Glubs happy”
–Wormwood, when King of the Merms is alive.
“Now that's a proper tree fort!”
–Winona, when King of the Merms is alive.
“There's a terrible stench of fish...”
–Wortox, when King of the Merms is alive.
“Need royal guard to protect new King!”
–Wurt, when King of the Merms is alive.
“They're friendly!”
–Walter, when King of the Merms is alive.
“That little merm is really turning this place around.”
–Wanda, when King of the Merms is alive.
“A royal guard with no Royal to guard.”
–Wilson, when King of the Merms is dead.
“I bet that would catch fire reeeal easy.”
–Willow, when King of the Merms is dead.
“Is tree full of fish!”
–Wolfgang, when King of the Merms is dead.
“They fight without purpose...”
–Wendy, when King of the Merms is dead.
“STATUS: INACTIVE”
–WX-78, when King of the Merms is dead.
“A crude, but effective fortification.”
–Wickerbottom, when King of the Merms is dead.
“Feels like they're waiting for something.”
–Woodie, when King of the Merms is dead.
“A kingdom without a king.”
–Maxwell, when King of the Merms is dead.
“They are lost without their chieftain.”
–Wigfrid, when King of the Merms is dead.
“We better not get too close...”
–Webber, when King of the Merms is dead.
“They don't look so friendly now...”
–Warly, when King of the Merms is dead.
“Glub Glubs inside”
–Wormwood, when King of the Merms is dead.
“It looks kinda gloomy.”
–Winona, when King of the Merms is dead.
“Guards with no king, like puppets with no string.”
–Wortox, when King of the Merms is dead.
“Royal guard need King to protect...”
–Wurt, when King of the Merms is dead.
“Wow, it's like a tree fort!”
–Walter, when King of the Merms is dead.
“The poor scaly things seem quite lost without a king.”
–Wanda, when King of the Merms is dead.
Merm Flort-ifications are a craftable Structure exclusive to Wurt in Don't Starve Together. They are found in the Structures Filter and Survivor Items Filter, require 5 Boards, 1 Tentacle Spots, and 2 Spears to craft, and an Science Machine to prototype. They can also only be placed on Marsh Turf.
Merm Flort-ifications spawn a single Loyal Merm Guard if a King of the Merms is present in the world. When killed, Loyal Merm Guards respawn in 4 minutes, or 6 days if the Loyal Merm Guard spawned in Winter. However, if the Merm Flort-ifications was built during Winter, Loyal Merm Guards will respawn in 4 minutes until the next Winter.

Merm Flort-ifications were introduced to Don't Starve Together in the Wurt Character Update.
"Flort-ifications" appears to be a portmanteau of "Flort" and "Fortifications", 'Flort' evidently being related to Merms.
The amount of time it takes for a Loyal Merm Guard to respawn depends on what season was when the Loyal Merm Guard spawned, not the season it died. If a Loyal Merm Guard spawns during Autumn, it will take 4 minutes to respawn, even if it died in Winter. Likewise, a Loyal Merm Guard that spawns during Winter will take 6 days to respawn, even if it died in Spring.
